name: VASO Corp
summary: Vaso Corporation operates three business segments in healthcare and IT. Through VasoHealthcare, it exclusively represents GE HealthCare Technologies selling diagnostic imaging and ultrasound equipment to mid-market health providers. VasoTechnology provides managed network and security services via NetWolves. VasoMedical designs and sells proprietary cardiovascular devices including Biox Holter monitors, ARCS cloud-based ECG software, MobiCare vital-sign monitors, and EECP therapy systems for ischemic heart disease treatment in the U.S. and internationally.

products.name: Biox series Holter monitors
products.description: Ambulatory blood pressure recorders and Holter monitors for cardiovascular monitoring.

products.name: ARCS series software
products.description: Cloud-based SaaS analysis, reporting and communication software for ECG and blood pressure signals.

products.name: EECP therapy systems
products.description: Non-invasive outpatient treatment systems for ischemic heart disease using external counterpulsation.

products.name: Managed network infrastructure
products.description: Managed routers, switches and core network equipment services via NetWolves.

products.name: Managed network transport
products.description: FCC licensed carrier reselling services using 175+ facility partners.

products.name: Managed network security services
products.description: Network security management services delivered through VasoTechnology/NetWolves.

products.name: GEHC diagnostic imaging equipment
products.description: GE HealthCare diagnostic imaging and ultrasound systems sold to mid-market health providers.

products.name: GEHC service and training agreements
products.description: Service agreements and training services for GEHC equipment sold through VasoHealthcare.

partnerships.description: Exclusive sales representation agreement for select GEHC diagnostic imaging and ultrasound equipment through December 31, 2030.
Purchased VasoHealthcare IT Corp. from Vaso Corporation in November 2025.
Vaso holds 49% minority interest in EECP Global and provides management services under a Management Service Agreement.
